## `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md`

```markdown
---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / Use Case
Describe the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
Your idea for how to solve it.

## Example Usage

```python
# How you'd like the feature to work
from survey_toolkit import NewFeature
result = NewFeature(data).run()
